title: Protocol for dissection and tissue preparation of the spotted lanternfly, Lycorma delicatula (Hemiptera: Fulgoridae) for morphometric analysis and morphological analysis using scanning electron microscopy
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1drc5","text":"In this study, we focused on assessing changes in morphology of (a) the lanternfly mouthparts (stylets and labium), and (b) the lanternfly tarsal tips (arolia and tarsal claws) at each developmental stage","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
